---
title: "Contact & References"
---

## Get in Touch

I am always open to discussing data analytics, graduate opportunities, or project collaborations. The best way to reach me is by email.

| Method | Details |
|---|---|
| {{< fa envelope >}} Email | [gnanesh.reddy2@mail.dcu.ie](mailto:gnanesh.reddy2@mail.dcu.ie) |
| {{< fa brands linkedin >}} LinkedIn | [linkedin.com/in/gnaneshreddy16](https://www.linkedin.com/in/gnaneshreddy16){target="_blank"} |
| {{< fa brands github >}} GitHub | [github.com/gnaneshreddy16-tech](https://github.com/gnaneshreddy16-tech){target="_blank"} |
| {{< fa location-dot >}} Location | Dublin, Ireland |

::: {.callout-note}
I typically respond to emails within 24–48 hours.
:::

## Professional References

References are available upon request. Please contact me directly via email and I will provide details relevant to the role or context.

---

*This portfolio was built with [Quarto](https://quarto.org), managed with Git, and published via GitHub Pages.*
